name: @simulator/host-agent-contract
description: Closed v2 wire contract shared by the Simulator Host Agent broker, worker, shim, and module parser

scripts.build: bun run check:artifacts && bun build src/index.ts src/schema.ts src/fixtures.ts --outdir dist/browser --target browser --format esm --splitting && bun build src/node.ts --outfile dist/node.js --target node --format esm
